name: claude-code-config
description: Battle-tested configuration system for Claude Code agents: 28 architectural principles (incl. P-28 Feature-Layer Architecture for project-knowledge-as-a-navigable-tree), 19 safety hooks, 23 skills (incl. /layer-new + /feature-new for ULTRAPACK-style feature narratives), 16 alternative comparisons, 12 templates (incl. extended kb-skeleton with docs/layers/), diagnostic scripts (incl. build_kb_graph.py + validate_kb_links.py). Pairs with mclaude for multi-session coordination.
